subcodes.title: Words to M. R. Shirazi, spoken on 1914-04-07
subcodes.first_line: It is really very sad to see how Buddha and Christ are fallen into the hands of the bad people of their respective followers... At the very utmost photographs are for remembrance and not for worship.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @photographs and recordings, @birth of Christ; purity; virginity of Mary, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @idolatry, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha
